questionText: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q1][medium] Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text: SELECT Fiscal_Year."Fiscal Year", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") AS "total_revenue", SUM(Sales."Extended Amount" - Product."Standard Cost" * Sales."Order Quantity") AS "total_cost", SUM(Sales."Extended Amount" - Product."Standard Cost" * Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") AS "gross_profit", (SUM(Sales."Extended Amount" - Product."Standard Cost" * Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount")) / SUM(Sales."Extended Amount") * 100 AS "gross_margin_pct", COUNT(Sales."Sales Order Line") AS "total_order_lines" FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Date ON Sales."OrderDateKey" = Date."DateKey" JOIN Customer ON Sales."CustomerKey" = Customer."CustomerKey" JOIN Reseller ON Sales."ResellerKey" = Reseller."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Reseller."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales_Order."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales_Order."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" WHERE Date."Full Date" >= '2020-01-01' AND Date."Full Date" <= '2020-12-31' GROUP BY Fiscal_Year."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY Fiscal_Year."Fiscal Year" ASC

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

questionLabel: [Q3][hard] Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

Sales."Order Quantity") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") OVER () AS revenue_share_pct, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") OVER () AS units_sold, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") OVER () AS gross_profit, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" * questionLabel: [Q3][hard] Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

Sales."Order Quantity") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" * Sales."Order Quantity") OVER () AS revenue_share_pct, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price" *   Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":

Table "Sales_Territory":

questionLabel: [Q4][medium] List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT Product."Product", Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS revenue, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS units_sold, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price")) / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS margin_pct FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Category ON Product."Category" = Category."Category" JOIN Subcategory ON Product."Subcategory" = Subcategory."Subcategory" WHERE Sales."OrderDateKey" > 0 GROUP BY Product."Product", Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory" ORDER BY distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT Product."Product", Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS revenue, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS units_sold, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price")) / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS margin_pct FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Category ON Product."Category" = Category."Category" JOIN Subcategory ON Product."Subcategory" = Subcategory."Subcategory" WHERE Sales."OrderDateKey" > 0 GROUP BY Product."Product", Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory" ORDER BY payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

questionText: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
questionLabel: [Q4][medium] List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text: SELECT Product."Product", Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS revenue, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS units_sold, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") * SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price")) / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Unit Price") AS margin_pct FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Category ON Product."Category" = Category."Category" JOIN Subcategory ON Product."Subcategory" = Subcategory."Subcategory" WHERE Sales."OrderDateKey" > 0 GROUP BY Product."Product", Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory" ORDER BY messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

questionText: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
questionLabel: [Q6][hard] List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.

SELECT Customer."Customer", Customer."City", Customer."State-Province", Customer."Country-Region", SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS total_orders, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS total_line_items, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS total_units, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") * SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS lifetime_revenue, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") * SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") * SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS lifetime_profit FROM Customer JOIN Sales ON Customer."CustomerKey" = Sales."CustomerKey" WHERE Customer."CustomerKey" != -1 GROUP BY Customer."Customer", Customer."City", Customer."State-Province", Customer."Country-Region" ORDER BY lifetime_revenue_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_descending_des query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

questionText: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
questionLabel: [Q6][hard] List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.

payload.text: SELECT Customer."Customer", Customer."City", Customer."State-Province", Customer."Country-Region", SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS total_orders, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS total_line_items, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS total_units, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") * SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS lifetime_revenue, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") * SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") - SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") * SUM(Sales."Order Quantity") AS lifetime_profit FROM Customer JOIN Sales ON Customer."CustomerKey" = Sales."CustomerKey" WHERE Customer."CustomerKey" != -1 GROUP BY Customer."Customer", Customer."City", Customer."State-Province", Customer."Country-Region" ORDER BY selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

payload.text: SELECT s."Subcategory", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "order_lines", SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", AVG(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "avg_list_price", SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") - SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") * AVG(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "gross_profit", (SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") - SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") * AVG(s."Unit Price Discount Pct")) / SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" s GROUP BY s."Subcategory" ORDER BY "Subcategory" DESC

questionText: Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q9][hard] Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

payload.text: SELECT s."Subcategory", SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "order_lines", SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "revenue", SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold", AVG(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "avg_list_price", SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") - SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") * AVG(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "gross_profit", (SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") - SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") * AVG(s."Unit Price Discount Pct")) / SUM(s."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "margin_pct" FROM "Sales" s GROUP BY s."Subcategory" ORDER BY "Subcategory" DESC

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

questionText: Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.
questionLabel: [Q11][easy] Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.

payload.text: SELECT Category."Category", COUNT(Product."ProductKey") AS "product_count", AVG(Product."List Price") AS "avg_list_price", MIN(Product."List Price") AS "min_list_price", MAX(Product."List Price") AS "max_list_price" FROM Product JOIN Category ON Product."Category" = Category."Category" GROUP BY Category."Category" ORDER BY "Product" DESC

questionText: Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.
questionLabel: [Q12][easy] Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.

payload.text: SELECT CountryRegion."Country-Region", COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."Reseller ID") AS reseller_count, COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."Business Type") AS business_type_count, COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."State-Province") AS state_count FROM Reseller JOIN Sales_Territory ON Reseller."Reseller ID" = Sales_Territory."Reseller ID" JOIN Sales_Territory_Region ON Sales_Territory."Region" = Sales_Territory_Region."Region" JOIN Country_Region ON Sales_Territory_Region."Country-Region" = Country_Region."Country-Region" GROUP BY CountryRegion."Country-Region" ORDER BY   Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

columnref ::= "\"Customer\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"State-Province\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Country-Region\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Postal Code\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"DateKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Date\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Fiscal Year\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Fiscal Quarter\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Month\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"MonthKey\"" | "\"Date\"" "." "\"Full Date\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"ProductKey\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Product\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Standard Cost\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Color\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"List Price\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Model\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Subcategory\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"Category\"" | "\"Product\"" "." "\"SKU\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." "\"ResellerKey\"" | "\"Reseller\"" "." questionText: Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.
questionLabel: [Q12][easy] Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.

payload.text: SELECT CountryRegion."Country-Region", COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."Reseller ID") AS reseller_count, COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."Business Type") AS business_type_count, COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."State-Province") AS state_count FROM Reseller JOIN Sales_Territory ON Reseller."Reseller ID" = Sales_Territory."Reseller ID" JOIN Sales_Territory_Region ON Sales_Territory."Region" = Sales_Territory_Region."Region" JOIN Country_Region ON Sales_Territory_Region."Country-Region" = Country_Region."Country-Region" GROUP BY CountryRegion."Country-Region" ORDER BY questionText: Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.
questionLabel: [Q12][easy] Show the number of resellers, number of distinct business types, and number of distinct states/provinces for each country. Return columns: Country-Region, reseller_count, business_type_count, state_count. Sort by reseller_count descending.

payload.text: SELECT CountryRegion."Country-Region", COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."Reseller ID") AS reseller_count, COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."Business Type") AS business_type_count, COUNT(DISTINCT Reseller."State-Province") AS state_count FROM Reseller JOIN Sales_Territory ON Reseller."Reseller ID" = Sales_Territory."Reseller ID" JOIN Sales_Territory_Region ON Sales_Territory."Region" = Sales_Territory_Region."Region" JOIN Country_Region ON Sales_Territory_Region."Country-Region" = Country_Region."Country-Region" GROUP BY CountryRegion."Country-Region" ORDER BY questionText: List all distinct product categories. Return columns: Category. Sort by Category ascending.
questionLabel: [Q13][trivial] List all distinct product categories. Return columns: Category. Sort by Category ascending.

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query
List all distinct product categories. Return columns: Category. Sort by Category ascending.

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query
List all distinct sales channels. Return columns: Channel. Sort by Channel ascending.

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

columnref ::= "\"Customer\"" "." "\"CustomerKey\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer ID\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"Customer\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." "\"City\"" | "\"Customer\"" "." messages.content:
You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:

questionText: List all distinct customer countries. Return columns: Country-Region. Sort by Country-Region ascending.
questionLabel: [Q18][trivial] List all distinct customer countries. Return columns: Country-Region. Sort by Country-Region ascending.

payload.text: SELECT DISTINCT Country_Region."Country-Region" FROM Customer JOIN Customer_Key ON Customer."CustomerKey" = Customer_Key."CustomerKey" JOIN Country_Region ON Customer_Key."Country-Region" = Country_Region."Country-Region" ORDER BY Country_Region."Country-Region" ASC

payload.text: SELECT Channel."Channel", Category."Category", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "total_revenue", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "units_sold", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "revenue_per_unit", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "avg_list_price", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "realized_discount_pct", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "gross_profit", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "margin_pct" FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Reseller ON Sales."ResellerKey" = Reseller."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Reseller."ResellerKey" = Sales_Territory."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales_Order."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales_Order."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Customer ON Sales."CustomerKey" = Customer."CustomerKey" JOIN Date ON Sales."OrderDateKey" = Date."DateKey" JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Category ON Product."Category" = Category."Category" WHERE Channel."Channel" = 'Channel' AND Category."Category" = 'Category' GROUP BY Channel."Channel", Category."Category" ORDER BY Channel."Channel" ASC, total_revenue."Total Product Cost" DESC

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

You are a SQL query generator for DuckDB.
Generate SQL queries that answer the user's questions using DuckDB SQL syntax.
Make sure you quote all field, column and table names.

Here is the database schema:

Available tables:

Table "Customer":
  Columns: CustomerKey (BIGINT), Customer ID (VARCHAR), Customer (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR)

Table "Date":
  Columns: DateKey (BIGINT), Date (BIGINT), Fiscal Year (VARCHAR), Fiscal Quarter (VARCHAR), Month (VARCHAR), MonthKey (BIGINT), Full Date (VARCHAR)

Table "Product":
  Columns: ProductKey (BIGINT), Product (VARCHAR), Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Color (VARCHAR), List Price (DOUBLE), Model (VARCHAR), Subcategory (VARCHAR), Category (VARCHAR), SKU (VARCHAR)

Table "Reseller":
  Columns: ResellerKey (BIGINT), Business Type (VARCHAR), Reseller (VARCHAR), City (VARCHAR), State-Province (VARCHAR), Country-Region (VARCHAR), Postal Code (VARCHAR), Reseller ID (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), ResellerKey (BIGINT), CustomerKey (BIGINT), ProductKey (BIGINT), OrderDateKey (BIGINT), DueDateKey (BIGINT), ShipDateKey (BIGINT), SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Order Quantity (BIGINT), Unit Price (DOUBLE), Extended Amount (DOUBLE), Product Standard Cost (DOUBLE), Total Product Cost (DOUBLE), Sales Amount (DOUBLE), Unit Price Discount Pct (BIGINT)

Table "Sales_Order":
  Columns: SalesOrderLineKey (BIGINT), Sales Order (VARCHAR), Sales Order Line (VARCHAR), Channel (VARCHAR)

Table "Sales_Territory":
  Columns: SalesTerritoryKey (BIGINT), Region (VARCHAR), Country (VARCHAR), Group (VARCHAR)


Instructions:
- Output a SQL SELECT query that answers the question.
- Do not output anything other than the SQL query

For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.

questionText: For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. questionLabel: [Q23][hard] For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.

payload.text: SELECT Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory", Category."Category" AS "Category_rank", Subcategory."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory_rank", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "revenue_rank", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "revenue", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "units_sold", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "gross_profit", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "category_revenue_share_pct" FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Customer ON Sales."CustomerKey" = Customer."CustomerKey" JOIN Reseller ON Sales."ResellerKey" = Reseller."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales_Order."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Category ON Product."Category" = Category."Category" JOIN Subcategory ON Product."Subcategory" = Subcategory."Subcategory" WHERE Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" > 0 GROUP BY Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory" ORDER BY Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory", Category."Category" ASC

payload.text: SELECT Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory", Category."Category" AS "Category_rank", Subcategory."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory_rank", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "revenue_rank", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "revenue", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "units_sold", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "gross_profit", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct") AS "category_revenue_share_pct" FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Customer ON Sales."CustomerKey" = Customer."CustomerKey" JOIN Reseller ON Sales."ResellerKey" = Reseller."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales_Order."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Sales."SalesTerritoryKey" = Sales_Territory."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN Category ON Product."Category" = Category."Category" JOIN Subcategory ON Product."Subcategory" = Subcategory."Subcategory" WHERE Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" > 0 GROUP BY Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory" ORDER BY Category."Category", Subcategory."Subcategory", Category."Category" ASC

questionLabel: [Q24][hard] Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.

payload.text: SELECT Channel."Channel", Product."Category", SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") AS revenue, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") / SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel."Channel") AS channel_revenue_share_pct, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel."Channel" ORDER BY SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") DESC) AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT Sales."Sales Order Line") AS orders, SUM(Sales."Unit Price Discount Pct" * Sales."Extended Amount") OVER (PARTITION BY Channel."Channel", Product."Category") AS gross_profit FROM Sales JOIN Product ON Sales."ProductKey" = Product."ProductKey" JOIN Reseller ON Sales."ResellerKey" = Reseller."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Territory ON Reseller."ResellerKey" = Sales_Territory."ResellerKey" JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales."SalesOrderLineKey" = Sales_Order."SalesOrderLineKey" JOIN Customer ON Sales."CustomerKey" = Customer."CustomerKey" WHERE Channel."Channel" = 'Online' GROUP BY Channel."Channel", Product."Category" ORDER BY Channel."Channel" ASC, Product."Category" ASC

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

payload.grammar:
root ::= ctequery | okstring

okstring ::= "OK"

ctequery ::= withclause query | query

withclause ::= "WITH " ctedef (", " ctedef)*

ctedef ::= identifier " AS (" query ")"

query ::= "SELECT " distinctclause selectlist " FROM " fromclause whereclause groupclause orderclause limitclause

distinctclause ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

selectlist ::= selectexpr (", " selectexpr)*

selectexpr ::= expr " AS " alias | expr

alias ::= quotedname | identifier

expr ::= addexpr

addexpr ::= mulexpr ((" + " | " - ") mulexpr)*

mulexpr ::= unaryexpr ((" * " | " / ") unaryexpr)*

unaryexpr ::= atomexpr | "-" atomexpr

atomexpr ::= funccall | columnref | literal | "(" expr ")" | countstar | windowexpr | casexpr

funccall ::= aggfunc "(" distinctarg expr ")" | "ROUND(" expr ", " number ")" | "NULLIF(" expr ", " literal ")" | "COALESCE(" expr ", " expr ")"

countstar ::= "COUNT(*)"

distinctarg ::= "DISTINCT " | ""

aggfunc ::= "SUM" | "COUNT" | "AVG" | "MIN" | "MAX"

windowexpr ::= funccall " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")" | funccall " OVER ()" | windowfunc "(" expr ")" " OVER (" partitionclause orderclause ")"

windowfunc ::= "ROW_NUMBER" | "RANK" | "DENSE_RANK" | "LAG" | "LEAD"

partitionclause ::= "PARTITION BY " exprlist | ""

casexpr ::= "CASE " expr whenlist caseelse " END" | "CASE " whenlist caseelse " END"

whenlist ::= whenitem whenitem*

whenitem ::= " WHEN " expr " THEN " expr

caseelse ::= " ELSE " expr | ""

fromclause ::= tableitem (" JOIN " tableitem " ON " expr " = " expr)*

tableitem ::= tablename " " identifier | tablename | identifier

whereclause ::= " WHERE " condition | ""

condition ::= compareexpr (" AND " compareexpr)* | compareexpr (" OR " compareexpr)*

compareexpr ::= expr " " compareop " " expr | "(" condition ")"

compareop ::= "=" | "!=" | "<>" | "<" | ">" | "<=" | ">="

groupclause ::= " GROUP BY " exprlist | ""

orderclause ::= " ORDER BY " orderitem (", " orderitem)* | ""

orderitem ::= expr | expr " ASC" | expr " DESC"

limitclause ::= " LIMIT " number | ""

exprlist ::= expr (", " expr)*

literal ::= sqstring | number | negliteral

negliteral ::= "-" number

number ::= [0-9] [0-9]* ("." [0-9]+)?

sqstring ::= "'" sqchars "'"

sqchars ::= sqchar*

sqchar ::= [^']

identifier ::= [a-zA-Z_] [a-zA-Z0-9_]*

quotedname ::= "\"" qnchars "\""

qnchars ::= qnchar+

qnchar ::= [a-zA-Z0-9_ ] | "-"

tablename ::= "\"Customer\"" | "\"Date\"" | "\"Product\"" | "\"Reseller\"" | "\"Sales\"" | "\"Sales_Order\"" | "\"Sales_Territory\""

questionText: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

Order Line") OVER (PARTITION BY T1."Group", T1."Fiscal Year")) AS "channel_revenue_share_pct" FROM "Sales" AST1 JOIN "Sales_Territory" AST2 ON T1."SalesTerritoryKey" = T2."SalesTerritoryKey" JOIN
